sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55609" key="kataxliaste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταχλῐαστέον</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χλιαίνω</etym>) <sense id="n55609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must warm thoroughly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
